title: callitriche raveniana
intro: Callitriche raveniana, also known as Raven's Callitriche or Raven's Water Starwort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Callitriche raveniana include its potential to help alleviate urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and urinary incontinence, as well as its ability to reduce fever and soothe sore throats. Callitriche raveniana can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
